Fear and Greed has ticked up to
39
(Fear)
and BTC is at
$65.5K
this morning. Bitcoin pulled back slightly overnight after
failing to hold above $66K, retracing as traders position
cautiously ahead of next week's Fed decision.

Regulatory pressure intensified yesterday on multiple fronts.
The CLARITY Act draft dropped at 616 pages. The SEC flagged DeFi
vaults as potential securities. FATF declared most DeFi platforms
are not truly decentralised. And Franklin Templeton made a bold
case for why AI agents need blockchain more than any other
infrastructure.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

The SEC Just Warned DeFi Vault Builders About Securities Law

SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce published a statement on July
22 warning that on-chain vaults and lending protocols may already
qualify as securities under federal law. She said putting a
financial product on a blockchain does not change its legal
classification.

Morpho fell roughly 5% on the day. Over $8.6 billion sits across
788 curated vaults serving 1.4 million users.

What test does Peirce say determines whether a vault qualifies
as a security?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/_qIVz8Weqmx9m48BrZZpzA~~/AAQRxRA~/iqgaTYrR36-trmcVoR-HewoJpE6aR9JAaDSnV-U9Nn5Da0wR-FyyTnaXKIW2VTBShJwmlKThijLfTNMS01jil0KS_FlwgH9aoxzL4sOXin4W-igiSOd3wZLuboM9s1M8Hyc-0hMaMIvYQPMtnrICE7_rW6xpL0aiISIqOn9BiWzcQs311HRn5yyAfnRjwLpqREv5Zwd4DU

76381.subject: The Ultimate Guide to Kimi K3 рҹӨ–
76381.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/kimi-k3-ultimate-guide

рҹ‘Ӣ Hey, Linas here! Every day, I break down 3 stories shaping the future of FinTech & Artificial Intelligence - plus the money movements and trends worth tracking. First time here? 397k+ FinTech and AI leaders get this daily. Join them:
Last month, GLM-5.2 [ https://substack.com/redirect/c2213750-873b-4f21-a970-6f1440746498?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] delivered the ChatGPT moment for local AI [ https://substack.com/redirect/c2213750-873b-4f21-a970-6f1440746498?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ]: the first open-weight model good enough to be a daily driver on your own hardware. Yet, it left one question hanging: what happens when an open lab stops merely catching up to the closed frontier and starts beating it? рҹӨ”
Kimi K3 is the answer.
Released on July 16 by Moonshot AI, the Beijing lab behind the Kimi assistant, K3 is a 2.8-trillion-parameter open-weight flagship: the largest ever released, with a 1,048,576-token context window that swallows entire codebases and data rooms in one pass, native image and video understanding, and always-on reasoning.
Kimi K3 vs. Claude Fable 5. Credit: @shiri_shh via X
In its first week, independent testing produced results no open model has ever posted:
#1 in the world for frontend coding: 1,679 Elo on Arena, ahead of Claude Fable 5 (1,631) and GPT-5.6 Sol (1,618) in blind human voting (Arena)
#1 on confirmed task success across 8,000+ live agentic sessions (Arena Agent)
#1 in 3D design, 82 Elo ahead of second-place Fable 5 (Design Arena)
#2 in the world on agentic knowledge work, the spreadsheets-memos-presentations grind that fills every analystвҖҷs week, ahead of GPT-5.6 Sol, Sonnet 5, and Opus 4.8 (Artificial Analysis)
Tied GPT-5.6 for the highest score ever recorded on CVE detection, at a fraction of the cost (Aikido)
#3 on the Intelligence Index, the highest placement an open-weight model has ever managed (Artificial Analysis)
All of that at roughly one-third of the price. Together AIвҖҷs engineering teardown found Fable 5-level software-engineering performance at ~35% of the cost, and Moonshot says the weights go up for free download on July 27.
Credit: Command Code via X
One caveat before the hype takes over. Like GLM-5.2вҖҷs maker ZAI, Moonshot is a Beijing-based lab, and the same sovereignty considerations flagged in the GLM-5.2 deep dive [ https://substack.com/redirect/c2213750-873b-4f21-a970-6f1440746498?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] apply here: open weights mitigate some of that risk; the hosted API does not.
But the model is only half the story, because K3 is also the least forgiving frontier model on the market: a long-horizon work engine, not a chatbot. Deliberately slow, reasoning at maximum effort by default, and dramatically better (and 10x cheaper, via cache discounts) the longer and more context

76380.subject: В«KoЕЎiceВ»: MinebeaMitsumi Europe вҖ“ Advanced Development Leading Proceess Development Engineer for MinebeaMitsumi development centre KoЕЎice (m/f/d) СӮР° С–РҪСҲС–
76380.body:
РЎРҝРҫРІС–СүРөРҪРҪСҸ РҝСҖРҫ РІР°РәР°РҪСҒС–С— РІ KoЕЎice          
РқРҫРІС– РІР°РәР°РҪСҒС–С— РІС–РҙРҝРҫРІС–РҙР°СҺСӮСҢ РІР°СҲРёРј РҪР°Р»Р°СҲСӮСғРІР°РҪРҪСҸРј.
РҡРөСҖСғРІР°СӮРё СҒРҝРҫРІС–СүРөРҪРҪСҸРјРё: https://www.linkedin.com/comm/jobs/alerts?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_job_alert_digest_01%3B%2Blydh5ttTmSN3BpwPn6sJA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=237vd7w205VIk1&trk=eml-email_job_alert_digest_01-primary_job_list-0-manage_alerts_text_ssid_7505287122_fmid_fz96fz~mrxcszai~7h&trkEmail=eml-email_job_alert_digest_01-primary_job_list-0-manage_alerts_text_ssid_7505287122_fmid_fz96fz~mrxcszai~7h-null-fz96fz~mrxcszai~7h-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrxcszai-7h&otpToken=YzhlYTc5ZDY5OTM2YTE0OWFhMDA3MDdkNjBkNTRjYWJhODA5YmMzM2ViMjUzZTAzN2FkYmFiNTAyNGQ3ZDQ5Njg2NmJiYzVkNjQwYzBlOTRhMTk0ZDdkNzVlNjgwMzcwZjc4MDM2NjRmMGQ4YjQ1MTNmOTFhODc1ODRlYjI2MmI2MmYzZjFkOTVjNGZkZCwyLDE%3D
            
Advanced Development Leading Proceess Development Engineer for MinebeaMitsumi development centre KoЕЎice (m/f/d)
MinebeaMitsumi Europe

1 РәРҫРҪСӮР°РәСӮ

76324.subject: RE: Wedding photo+video
76324.body:
Dear Oleg,

There is no obstacle to photography.
The castle is also open on Sunday.
The fee for photography is 45,000 HUF
You will find all the important information in the attachment.
I will send it in English and Slovak.

I have registered you, you can pay on site

Best regards,


From: Oleg Novosadov <novosadovoleg@gmail.com>
Sent: Wednesday, July 22, 2026 11:51 AM
To: FГјzГ©rradvГЎny HelyszГӯn <fuzerradvanyikastely@nof.hu>
Subject: Wedding photo+video

Good day,

I would like to reserve a wedding photo session on 26 July 2026, from 12:00 PM to 2:00 PM, for 5 people.

We would like the photo session to take place inside the castle as well as outside in the castle park.

Thank you, and I look forward to your confirmation.

76321.subject: Re: Svadba na Bukovine
76321.body:
Samozrejme. Budem ДҚakaЕҘ

---

Veronika HricovГЎ

KoordinГЎtor na svadbe

+421948 434 576

www.bukovinakosice.sk

DЕҲa 2026-07-22 11:21 Oleg Novosadov napГӯsal(a):

> Dobry , mozem Vam napisat na whatsapp?
> 
> РІСӮ, 21 Р»РёРҝ. 2026вҖҜСҖ. Рҫ 11:24 Veronika HricovГЎ 
> <veronika.hricova@bukovinakosice.sk> РҝРёСҲРө:
> 
> Ano mohli, pridem za vami,ukazem vam sklad a odovzdam aj klГәДҚe od vaЕЎej 
> izby.
> Ano v nedelu kludne priДҸte od rГЎna,budeme prestieraЕҘ.
> Chcem sa len opГҪtaЕҘ o ktorej vam pridu v nedelu zdobiЕҘ salu?
> ДҺakujem
> 
> ---
> 
> Veronika HricovГЎ
> 
> KoordinГЎtor na svadbe
> 
> +421948 434 576
> 
> www.bukovinakosice.sk [1]
> 
> DЕҲa 2026-07-21 11:17 Oleg Novosadov napГӯsal(a):
> 
> Dobry den,
> 
> Mohli by sme prist okolo 11:00 v subotu?
> 
> Hosti 47 + 1 deta ktore nema este 1rok.
> Mohli by sme v nedelu rano mat u Vas fotenie pre zenicha a nevestu?
> 
> Dakujem pekne , pekny den prajem
> 
> РІСӮ, 21 Р»РёРҝ. 2026вҖҜСҖ. Рҫ 07:03 Veronika HricovГЎ 
> <veronika.hricova@bukovinakosice.sk> РҝРёСҲРө:
> 
> DobrГҪ deЕҲ prajem
> VГЎЕЎ svadobnГҪ deЕҲ u NГЎs sa VГЎm blГӯЕҫi preto ak na mЕҲa mate akekoДҫvek 
> otГЎzky, som tu pre VГЎs.
> ZГЎroveЕҲ sa chcem opГҪtat,kedy vГЎm  v sobotu vyhovuje stretnutie u nГЎs 
> aby sme si preЕЎli poslednГ© detaily,ukГЎzala vam sklady a priestory kde 
> si mГҙЕҫte zloЕҫiЕҘ veci. Hosti budete mat nakoniec 47 dospelГҪch,bez deti?  
> VerГӯm, Еҫe vЕЎetko bude podДҫa vaЕЎich predstav.TeЕЎime sa na VГЎs.
> 
> S pozdravom Veronika Koordinatorka
> 
> --
> 
> Veronika HricovГЎ
> 
> KoordinГЎtor na svadbe
> 
> +421948 434 576
> 
> www.bukovinakosice.sk [1]
